item.description: Gran pantalla de Thiago Almada para que apareciera el número "10" argentino con una gran definición, y así, superar al delantero alemán en Copas del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Messi para superar a Miroslav Klose como máximo goleador de la historia de los Mundiales
media:content.media:description: Gran pantalla de Thiago Almada para que apareciera el número "10" argentino con una gran definición, y así, superar al delantero alemán en Copas del Mundo.

item.title: Golazo de Messi para superar a Miroslav Klose como máximo goleador de la historia de los Mundiales

item.dc:creator: Amin Khodadadi
Mithil Aggarwal
item.description: TEHRAN — For a brief moment Sunday, when striker Mehdi Taremi put the ball into the Belgian net, joy was unbridled across the Iranian capital — a welcome change in a city where the majority of the conversation is dominated by talk of the war

media:content.media:text: Iranian fans watch their national team's World Cup match against Belgium at Viking Cafe in Tehran on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans watch their national team's World Cup match against Belgium at Viking Cafe in Tehran on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: A billboard in Tehran shows an AI generated image of Iranian goalkeeper Alireza Beiranvand holding one of the victims of a U.S. strike on a school.
media:content.media:description: A billboard in Tehran shows an AI generated image of Iranian goalkeeper Alireza Beiranvand holding one of the victims of a U.S. strike on a school.

media:content.media:text: Soccer fans watch the game at Viking Cafe in North Tehran.
media:content.media:description: Soccer fans watch the game at Viking Cafe in North Tehran.

media:content.media:text: Signage at Viking Cafe in North Tehran on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: Signage at Viking Cafe in North Tehran on Sunday.

item.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: Last week, Argentina’s Lionel Messi, France’s Kylian Mbappé and Norway’s Erling Haaland scored a combined seven goals on the same day.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi runs on the soccer field with his arms outstretched in celebration
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Argentina celebrates scoring his team's third and hat trick goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group J match against Algeria on June 16.

media:content.media:text: Mohamed Salah, left, kicks the ball across the field towards the net
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Argentina celebrates scoring his team's third and hat trick goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group J match against Algeria on June 16.

media:content.media:text: Mbappe curls his fists in celebration on the field
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi of Argentina celebrates scoring his team's third and hat trick goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group J match against Algeria on June 16.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: What will Messi, Mbappé and Haaland do for an encore?

item.description: Gran pantalla de Thiago Almada para que apareciera el número "10" argentino con una gran definición, y así, superar al delantero alemán en Copas del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Golazo de Messi para superar a Miroslav Klose como máximo goleador de la historia de los Mundiales
media:content.media:description: Gran pantalla de Thiago Almada para que apareciera el número "10" argentino con una gran definición, y así, superar al delantero alemán en Copas del Mundo.

item.title: Golazo de Messi para superar a Miroslav Klose como máximo goleador de la historia de los Mundiales

item.description: El astro argentino falló el penal que lo habría convertido en el máximo goleador en la historia de los Mundiales. El momento dejó a Dallas en un mar de incredulidad y drama, con los aficionados divididos entre la frustración y la tensión por lo que viene.

media:content.media:title: Shock en el Mundial: Messi falla un penal ante Austria y Dallas estalla en reacciones
media:content.media:description: El astro argentino falló el penal que lo habría convertido en el máximo goleador en la historia de los Mundiales. El momento dejó a Dallas en un mar de incredulidad y drama, con los aficionados divididos entre la frustración y la tensión por lo que viene.

item.title: Shock en el Mundial: Messi falla un penal ante Austria y Dallas estalla en reacciones

item.description: El futbolista argentino no pudo hacer efectivo un penalti que lo podía colocar como el máximo anotador en la historia de los Mundiales.

media:content.media:title: Messi falla un penal que sorprende al mundo entero: Se quedó cerca de superar a Klose
media:content.media:description: El futbolista argentino no pudo hacer efectivo un penalti que lo podía colocar como el máximo anotador en la historia de los Mundiales.

item.title: Messi falla un penal que sorprende al mundo entero: Se quedó cerca de superar a Klose

item.description: Austria ajusta los últimos detalles antes de medirse a Argentina por la cima del Grupo J en un choque decisivo del Mundial, donde un triunfo vale oro para asegurar el pase directo.

media:content.media:title: La batalla por el Grupo J: Austria prepara su embestida contra Argentina
media:content.media:description: Austria ajusta los últimos detalles antes de medirse a Argentina por la cima del Grupo J en un choque decisivo del Mundial, donde un triunfo vale oro para asegurar el pase directo.

item.title: La batalla por el Grupo J: Austria prepara su embestida contra Argentina

item.description: La leyenda de la Selección Argentina se pronunció sobre una de las máximas figuras de la Albiceleste y su prometedor futuro.

media:content.media:title: Batistuta define a Julián Álvarez pero no lo ve como sucesor de Messi
media:content.media:description: La leyenda de la Selección Argentina se pronunció sobre una de las máximas figuras de la Albiceleste y su prometedor futuro.

item.title: Batistuta define a Julián Álvarez pero no lo ve como sucesor de Messi

item.description: El defensor francés recuerda cómo vestir la camiseta de Francia hizo realidad un sueño de infancia. Además, habla de la unión del grupo, la influencia de Neymar y Ronaldinho, y su ambición de triunfar en el Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: T: Malo Gusto: “Estoy aquí para ganar y darlo todo” | Hoy en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El defensor francés recuerda cómo vestir la camiseta de Francia hizo realidad un sueño de infancia. Además, habla de la unión del grupo, la influencia de Neymar y Ronaldinho, y su ambición de triunfar en el Mundial 2026.

item.title: T: Malo Gusto: “Estoy aquí para ganar y darlo todo” | Hoy en el Mundial

item.description: Los dirigidos por Ralf Rangnick se enfrentarán a la Argentina de Lionel Messi en un duelo donde ambos se juegan el pase a dieciseisavos si logran quedarse con el primer lugar del Grupo J.

media:content.media:title: Austria viaja a Arlington con la misión de frenar a Messi y Argentina
media:content.media:description: Los dirigidos por Ralf Rangnick se enfrentarán a la Argentina de Lionel Messi en un duelo donde ambos se juegan el pase a dieciseisavos si logran quedarse con el primer lugar del Grupo J.

item.title: Austria viaja a Arlington con la misión de frenar a Messi y Argentina

item.description: Roberto Ayala analiza el juego que debe enfrentar Argentina contra Austria en el que se define su clasificación, sabiendo que necesitan orden en lo táctico, no darle oportunidad al rival y estar enfocados en el objetivo.

media:content.media:title: Ayala: "Nos jugamos la clasificación en este partido ante Austria"
media:content.media:description: Roberto Ayala analiza el juego que debe enfrentar Argentina contra Austria en el que se define su clasificación, sabiendo que necesitan orden en lo táctico, no darle oportunidad al rival y estar enfocados en el objetivo.

item.title: Ayala: "Nos jugamos la clasificación en este partido ante Austria"

item.description: Los mediocampistas de Argentina pasaron a reconocer la cancha a unas horas de arrancar su segundo partido de la Copa del Mundo 2026, con un detalle que no podía pasar desapercibido...

media:content.media:title: Paredes y De Paul estudian la cancha... pero ¿dónde dejaron a Messi?
media:content.media:description: Los mediocampistas de Argentina pasaron a reconocer la cancha a unas horas de arrancar su segundo partido de la Copa del Mundo 2026, con un detalle que no podía pasar desapercibido...

item.title: Paredes y De Paul estudian la cancha... pero ¿dónde dejaron a Messi?

item.description: Con la ilusión intacta y el apoyo de su afición, Argentina llegó al estadio para afrontar su segundo compromiso del Mundial 2026. La Albiceleste buscará sumar tres puntos ante Austria en el Grupo J.

media:content.media:title: La Albiceleste hace su entrada para medirse con Austria
media:content.media:description: Con la ilusión intacta y el apoyo de su afición, Argentina llegó al estadio para afrontar su segundo compromiso del Mundial 2026. La Albiceleste buscará sumar tres puntos ante Austria en el Grupo J.

item.title: La Albiceleste hace su entrada para medirse con Austria

item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced he would resign from office after facing a rebellion from members of his own party. Starmer became prime minister in 2024 after winning a landslide election.

media:content.media:title: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation
media:content.media:description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced he would resign from office after facing a rebellion from members of his own party. Starmer became prime minister in 2024 after winning a landslide election.

item.title: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announces resignation

item.dc:creator: Chloe Melas
David K. Li
item.description: Entertainment icon Clive Davis, who shaped modern music as the founder of Arista Records and president of Columbia Records, died Monday, family members told NBC News

media:content.media:text: Clive Davis sits at a desk in an office by a window
media:content.media:description: American music executive Clive Davis, New York City, circa 1994.

item.title: Clive Davis, legendary music mogul who worked with Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies at 94

item.description: Vice President JD Vance made remarks on the progress of talks between the U.S. and Iran in Bürgenstock, Switzerland, highlighting a “successful foundation.” Additionally, Vance talked about progress towards protecting Lebanon’s “territorial integrity and sovereignty” and Israel’s security.

media:content.media:title: Vance touts 'successful foundation' in remarks on Iran-U.S. negotiations
media:content.media:description: Vice President JD Vance made remarks on the progress of talks between the U.S. and Iran in Bürgenstock, Switzerland, highlighting a “successful foundation.” Additionally, Vance talked about progress towards protecting Lebanon’s “territorial integrity and sovereignty” and Israel’s security.

item.title: Vance touts 'successful foundation' in remarks on Iran-U.S. negotiations

item.description: Alan Greenspan, the influential economist who chaired the Federal Reserve for two decades and was the beloved husband of NBC’s Andrea Mitchell, has died at 100 after complications from Parkinson's disease. NBC’s Kristen Welker shares a look back at Greenspan’s life and his impact on the economy.

media:content.media:title: Influential Former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan Dies at 100
media:content.media:description: Alan Greenspan, the influential economist who chaired the Federal Reserve for two decades and was the beloved husband of NBC’s Andrea Mitchell, has died at 100 after complications from Parkinson's disease. NBC’s Kristen Welker shares a look back at Greenspan’s life and his impact on the economy.

item.title: Influential Former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan Dies at 100

item.dc:creator: Gabe Gutierrez
Helen Graham
David K. Li
item.description: At least five people have been arrested in connection with the alleged vandalism of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, an administration official said Monday, as President Donald Trump threatened long prison terms for offenders

media:content.media:credit: Pete Kiehart for The Washington Post via Getty Images
media:content.media:text: National Park Service personnel vacuum algae from the Reflecting Pool on June 21, 2026 in Washington.
media:content.media:description: National Park Service personnel vacuum algae from the Reflecting Pool on June 21, 2026 in Washington.

media:content.media:text: A piece of blue coating, still attached to the bottom, bobs in the water at the Reflecting Pool on June 21, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A piece of blue coating, still attached to the bottom of the Reflecting Pool, bobs in the water Sunday.

item.title: At least five people arrested in alleged tampering of Reflecting Pool, official says

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: A radio telescope project known as the Deep Synoptic Array is moving forward. It aims to detect radio waves emitted by stars, planets, galaxies and other celestial objects.

media:content.media:text: Two prototype dishes seen outside, mountainous landscape behind them
media:content.media:description: Two prototype dishes for the Deep Synoptic Array at the Owens Valley Radio Observatory near Bishop, Calif.

media:content.media:text: People sit in a group against a wall, a project screen with people on Zoom appears in the background
media:content.media:description: Two prototype dishes for the Deep Synoptic Array at the Owens Valley Radio Observatory near Bishop, Calif.

item.title: World’s most sensitive radio telescope array set to be built in Nevada desert

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: Steve Kornacki is getting ready for another night at the Big Board, where he’ll break down primary election results in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah on Tuesday

media:content.media:text: Steve Kornacki
media:content.media:description: Steve Kornacki

item.title: Send your midterm elections questions for Steve Kornacki

item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

media:content.media:title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

item.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze midterm primary election results

media:content.media:text: Iranian fans watch their national team's World Cup match against Belgium at Viking Cafe in Tehran on Sunday.
media:content.media:description: Iranian fans watch their national team's World Cup match against Belgium at Viking Cafe in Tehran on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: A billboard in Tehran shows an AI generated image of Iranian goalkeeper Alireza Beiranvand holding one of the victims of a U.S. strike on a school.

item.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: Argentina star Lionel Messi has set a new record for career goals scored at the men’s World Cup, recording his 17th World Cup goal against Austria on Monday

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi #10 of Argentina celebrates after scoring his team's first goal against Austria at Dallas Stadium on June 22, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi #10 of Argentina celebrates after scoring his team's first goal against Austria at Dallas Stadium on June 22, 2026.

item.title: Lionel Messi breaks record for career goals scored at the World Cup

item.dc:creator: NBC News
item.description: Steve Kornacki is getting ready for another night at the Big Board, where he’ll break down primary election results in Maryland, New York, South Carolina and Utah on Tuesday

media:content.media:text: Steve Kornacki
media:content.media:description: Steve Kornacki

item.title: Send your midterm elections questions for Steve Kornacki

item.dc:creator: Mirna Alsharif
item.description: A judge on Monday dismissed a motion by Tyler Robinson’s attorneys to subpoena his former romantic partner to testify in-person in court next month

media:content.media:text: Charlie Kirk Murder Suspect Tyler Robinson Attends Court Hearing
media:content.media:description: Tyler Robinson during a hearing in Fourth District Court on Dec. 11, 2025 in Provo, Utah.

media:content.media:text: Political Activist Charlie Kirk Shot Dead At Utah Valley University
media:content.media:description: Tyler Robinson during a hearing in Fourth District Court on Dec. 11, 2025 in Provo, Utah.

item.title: Charlie Kirk shooting suspect’s effort to have former romantic partner testify in person is denied
